name: Madden's On Gull Lake
address: 11266 Pine Beach Peninsula Rd, Brainerd, MN 56401
about: Madden's on Gull Lake is a luxury hotel resort located on a 1,000-acre peninsula in the Brainerd Lakes Area of Minnesota. It has been providing award-winning golf and accommodations for over 90 years, operating as a family-owned, third-generation establishment. The venue emphasizes superior service and is recognized for its rich history and tradition, distinguishing it as one of the few remaining family-owned resorts in Minnesota. While primarily known for its golf courses, the venue offers virtual golf simulators and is closed to overnight guests from late 2025 to April 2026 for renovations.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to 3 state-of-the-art TrackMan virtual golf simulators, allowing golfers to maintain their game during the winter season.
The ability to play over 300 of the world's top golf courses and participate in custom club fittings for a personalized experience.
The resort's award-winning golf courses and prestigious hosting of events like the 2025 MGA Amateur Championship.

food_and_drink.notes: Dining options include The Classic Grill, Fairways, Mission Point, The Lobby Cafe, Parfecto Pizza, 19th Hole & Pool Deck, O'Madden Pub, Madden Bros. Market, and Bakery.
Available at various dining establishments including The Classic Grill, O'Madden Pub, and the 19th Hole & Pool Deck.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators available daily by appointment for virtual golf experiences.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for an optimal experience, although club rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The venue offers multiple on-site dining options including The Classic Grill and O'Madden Pub.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole simulation session takes approximately 1 to 1.5 hours, depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with amenities like the Adventure Cove Day Camp and activities suitable for children.

opening_hours: Saturday 4-8pm | Saturday 9am-6pm | Sunday 9am-5pm | Saturday 4-8pm | Saturday 9am-6pm | Sunday 9am-5pm | Saturday 4-8pm
